info.title: CC98 API
info.description: 根据 CC98 前端调用与真实接口响应维护的公共 API 契约。

post.description: The frontend calls this endpoint on the configured OpenID server.

get.description: Some frontend call sites send Authorization and some do not.

Get boards by repeated id query

View IP groups for a topic
